---
jupyter: python3
format: 
  pdf:
    echo: false
    geometry:
      - top=5mm        
      - left=5mm
      - right=5mm
      - bottom=20mm
      - headheight=35mm 
      - headsep=5mm 
      - includehead=true 
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{tabularx}
          \usepackage{multirow}
          \usepackage{graphicx}
          \usepackage{xcolor}
          \usepackage{fancyhdr}
          \usepackage{lastpage}
          \usepackage{multicol}
          \usepackage{ifthen}

          \pagestyle{fancy}
          \fancyhf{} 
          \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
          \newcounter{score}
          
          \fancyhead[C]{
            \noindent
            \bgroup
            \def\arraystretch{1.4}
            \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{|p{5.5cm}|p{1.8cm}|X|p{1.2cm}|p{1.8cm}|}
            \hline
            \multirow{5}{5.5cm}{
                \vspace*{1mm}
                \includegraphics[width=4.5cm]{logo} \\
                \fontsize{6pt}{7pt}\selectfont
                \textbf{CIVIL \& ENVIRONMENTAL ENGINEERING,}\\
                SKEMPTON BUILDING, IMPERIAL COLLEGE\\
                LONDON, SOUTH KENSINGTON CAMPUS,\\
                LONDON SW7 2AZ.\\[3mm]
                \normalsize\textbf{CALCULATION SHEET}
            }
            & \textbf{Job No.} & & \textbf{Sheet} & \textbf{Ref} \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \textbf{Job Title} & Steel Design Coursework & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\thepage\ of \pageref{LastPage}} \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \multicolumn{4}{p{\dimexpr\textwidth-5.5cm-8\tabcolsep-5\arrayrulewidth\relax}|}{
                \textbf{Subject} \newline
                \vspace*{1mm}
                \centerline{Floor 8 - Right Perimeter Design of Columns}
                \vspace*{1mm}
            } \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Client}} & \textbf{Made by} \quad  Pablo Peng & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\textbf{Date} \quad 03/03/2026} \\ \cline{3-5}
            & & \textbf{Checked by} \quad  Pablo Peng & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\textbf{Date}} \\ \hline
            \end{tabularx}
            \egroup
          }
---
```{python}
L = 54
Hr = 4
Hg = 6
H = 8*Hr + Hg
dfactor = 1.35
ifactor = 1.05
wfactor = 1.5
# Dead floor
gt_f = 0.7
gs_f = 3.38
gc_f = 0.5
gste_f = 0.3
gser_f = 1.4
# Impose floor
qpar_f = 1.0
qimp_f = 4.0
qcl = 1.2
Gtyp_f = gt_f + gs_f + gc_f + gste_f + gser_f
Qtyp_f = qpar_f + qimp_f
wtyp_f = dfactor * Gtyp_f + ifactor * Qtyp_f
# Dead roof
gt_r = 1.0
gs_r = 3.38
gc_r = 0.5
gste_r = 0.2
gser_r = 1.0
# Impose roof
qimp_r = 1.5
Gtyp_r = gt_r + gs_r + gc_r + gste_r + gser_r
Qtyp_r = qimp_r
wtyp_r = dfactor * Gtyp_r + ifactor * Qtyp_r
# Wind load
wk = 1.3
```
#
# Floor Loads
\begin{multicols}{2}
\begin{description}
    \item[]$G_{tiles}$ = `{python} gt_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{steel}$ = `{python} gste_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{cladding}$ = `{python} gc_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{slab}$ = `{python} gs_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{services}$ = `{python} gser_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$Q_{partitions}$ = `{python} qpar_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$Q_{imposed}$ = `{python} qimp_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$Q_{cladding}$ = `{python} qcl` $kN/m^2$
\end{description}
\end{multicols}

# Roof Loads
\begin{multicols}{2}
\begin{description}
    \item[]$G_{tiles}$ = `{python} gt_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{steel}$ = `{python} gste_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{cladding}$ = `{python} gc_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{slab}$ = `{python} gs_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{services}$ = `{python} gser_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$Q_{imposed}$ = `{python} qimp_r` $kN/m^2$
\end{description}
\end{multicols}

# Wind Load and partial factor
\begin{description}
    \item[]$W_k$ = `{python} wk`
    \item[]Partial factor for Dead load = `{python} dfactor`
    \item[]Partial factor for imposed load = `{python} ifactor`
    \item[]Partial factor for wind load = `{python} wfactor`
\end{description}

{{< pagebreak >}}
```{python}
# wind load per floor
Wtotal = wfactor*L*H*wk
Fb = wtotal/4
wudl = Fb/H
wr = wudl*Hr*0.5
wf1 = wudl*Hr
wf2 = wudl*Hg

# floor load
A = (60+45)*54/2
Fstorey = wtyp_f*A
EHF1 = 0.5*0.005*Fstorey
Froof = wtyp_r*A
EHF2 = 0.5*0.05*Froof

#load per floor
fg = wf1 + EHf1
ff = wf2 + EHF1
fr = wr + EHf2
```
#
